---
title: "Contacts"
---

For any questions, visit the [EUROCONTROL CRCO Portal](http://www.eurocontrol.int/crco) or contact the relevant department directly.

::: {.contact-grid}

::: {.contact-card}
### Billing, Claims & Stakeholder Relations

Contact this department (Unit **R3**) if:
*   You have a question concerning your invoice.
*   You want to report a change to your aircraft fleet.
*   You want to lodge a claim about wrongly billed flights.
*   You want to report a fraud attempt.
*   You need to update your legal/fiscal info (address, VAT number, AOC, etc.).
*   You want to check applicable tariffs or exemptions.

<ul class="contact-info-list">
  <li class="contact-info-item"><span class="contact-info-label">Phone</span> **+32 2 729 3838**</li>
  <li class="contact-info-item"><span class="contact-info-label">Fax</span> +32 2 729 9093</li>
  <li class="contact-info-item"><span class="contact-info-label">Email</span> [r3.crco@eurocontrol.int](mailto:r3.crco@eurocontrol.int)</li>
</ul>
:::

::: {.contact-card}
### Collection of Charges

Contact this department (Unit **R4**) if:
*   You want to know your current account balance.
*   You have a question about a reminder regarding arrears received from EUROCONTROL.

<ul class="contact-info-list">
  <li class="contact-info-item"><span class="contact-info-label">Phone</span> **+32 2 729 3296**</li>
  <li class="contact-info-item"><span class="contact-info-label">Fax</span> +32 2 729 9094</li>
  <li class="contact-info-item"><span class="contact-info-label">Email</span> [r4.crco@eurocontrol.int](mailto:r4.crco@eurocontrol.int)</li>
</ul>
:::

::: {.contact-card}
### Accounting & Treasury

Contact this department (Unit **R5**) if:
*   You have a question about your statement of account.
*   You made a mistake when paying (wrong currency, wrong amount).
*   You want to confirm that a payment reached EUROCONTROL's bank account.
*   You need a bank account certificate to proceed with a payment.
*   Your auditors require an official statement of account.

<ul class="contact-info-list">
  <li class="contact-info-item"><span class="contact-info-label">Phone</span> **+32 2 729 9164** / **0020** / **4642** / **+32 2 730 2501**</li>
  <li class="contact-info-item"><span class="contact-info-label">Fax</span> +32 2 729 9095</li>
  <li class="contact-info-item"><span class="contact-info-label">Email</span> [r5.crco@eurocontrol.int](mailto:r5.crco@eurocontrol.int)</li>
</ul>
:::

:::
